dimensions.name: Directness
dimensions.description: How directly, candidly, and straightforwardly you communicate your thoughts.

dimensions.name: Social Energy
dimensions.description: Your natural preference for social interaction vs reflection time.

dimensions.name: Reflectiveness
dimensions.description: Your tendency to process information deeply before reacting.

dimensions.name: Expressiveness
dimensions.description: How openly you convey emotion and personal warmth vs. maintaining an objective, reserved stance.

dimensions.name: Assertiveness
dimensions.description: How strongly you push for your own choices and opinions vs. accommodating those of others.

dimensions.name: Adaptability
dimensions.description: How easily you pivot and accept spontaneous changes vs. holding to plans and consistency.

dimensions.name: Pace
dimensions.description: Your preference for high-speed action and momentum vs. cautious, patient deliberation.

dimensions.name: Focus Orientation
dimensions.description: Whether you focus primarily on objective tasks and logic vs. group harmony and relationships.

dimensions.name: Vulnerability
dimensions.description: How openly you share your doubts, mistakes, and emotions vs. maintaining a stoic, guarded exterior.

dimensions.name: Conflict Engagement
dimensions.description: Your natural stance during friction—debating head-on vs. harmonizing and de-escalating.

dimensions.name: Feedback Style
dimensions.description: Providing raw, direct critique to push standards vs. supportive encouragement to protect confidence.

dimensions.name: Playfulness
dimensions.description: Using humor, teasing, and playfulness to connect vs. maintaining seriousness and gravitas.

questions.prompt: At a dinner party, someone confidently asserts a fact about a movie or historical event that you know is completely incorrect.
questions.instructions: Select one primary action and up to two optional secondary actions.

answerOptions.label: Correct them immediately and share the actual facts.
Ask curious questions to let them realize the contradiction themselves.
Keep silent and search it up on your phone privately.
Laugh it off, crack a joke, or steering the topic somewhere else.

questions.prompt: A close friend is sharing a complex personal dilemma, and you notice their shoulders tense up as they confuse their own story details.
questions.instructions: Select one primary response and up to two secondary responses.

answerOptions.label: Point out the inconsistency directly to help them untangle the timeline.
Just listen and offer emotional validation, ignoring the minor detail errors.
Wait until they finish, then ask calmly: 'Would you like some space to reflect first?'

questions.prompt: You arrive at a large house warming party where you only know the host, who is busy greeting guests.
questions.instructions: Select the one option that fits you best.

answerOptions.label: Walk straight into a circle, introduce yourself, and join the conversation.
Stand near the food or drinks, observe the rooms, and wait for someone to approach.

questions.prompt: You are organizing a weekend trip with friends, and one person is delaying their confirmation, holding up the group lodging booking.
questions.instructions: Select one primary and up to two secondary actions.

answerOptions.label: Send a direct text: 'Booking in 2 hours. If you haven't confirmed by then, we're booking without you.'
Call them privately to see if they're having hesitation, budget constraints, or other issues.
Book a room that has free cancellation anyway and tell them we've got them covered just in case.

questions.prompt: A friend is emotionally venting to you about a mutual friend's behavior that hurt them.
questions.instructions: Select the one option that fits you best.

answerOptions.label: Support them fully: validate their feelings and echo their frustration.
Offer neutral perspective: explain the other friend's possible point of view to ease anger.

questions.prompt: A friend shares a wild, highly impractical plan (e.g., buying a school bus to travel the world next month).
questions.instructions: Select one primary and up to two secondary actions.

answerOptions.label: Gently point out the massive logistical and financial challenges immediately.
Enthusiastically build on the dream: 'That's amazing! Imagine painting it yellow and...'
Listen quietly, evaluate if they are actually serious, and offer a balanced review later.

questions.prompt: You need to choose a restaurant in an unfamiliar neighborhood with zero signal/internet reviews available.

answerOptions.label: Walk into the first busy restaurant; any decision is better than walking around hungry.
Peek through windows, read the physical menus, and choose the most promising option.

questions.prompt: A friend asks you to review a creative draft or hobby project (like a short story or painting) they spent weeks on.
questions.instructions: Select one primary and up to two secondary actions.

answerOptions.label: Provide honest, constructive criticism, listing exactly what needs work.
Focus mostly on praising their effort and keep suggestions very gentle.
Ask them: 'Are you looking for encouragement or detailed feedback?' before sharing.

archetypes.name: The Socratic Connector
archetypes.description: You connect deeply through thoughtful questioning and warm diplomatic presence, preferring collaboration and dialogue over direct commands.

archetypes.name: The Independent Explorer
archetypes.description: You value autonomy and direct action, exploring ideas independently and voicing your candid perspective without hesitation.

archetypes.name: The Quiet Strategist
archetypes.description: You observe deeply and act with deliberate planning, offering carefully considered insights and maintaining a calm, introspective presence.

archetypes.name: The Empathic Challenger
archetypes.description: You combine raw honesty with intense social engagement, challenging group consensus directly out of care and interest in improvement.

insights.title: You guide conversations rather than pushing views.
insights.bodyTemplate: You tend to use questions to invite reflection, allowing others to arrive at realizations on their own. People experience you as collaborative and non-confrontational.
insights.alternativeTemplate: At times, people might find this indirect approach slow, wishing for a direct statement of your opinion.

insights.title: Your transparency is refreshing.
insights.bodyTemplate: You speak clearly and without filters. People know exactly where they stand with you, making you a reliable truth-teller in team settings.
insights.alternativeTemplate: In emotionally charged situations, your high directness could be perceived as blunt or insensitive.

insights.title: You are a master of social diplomacy.
insights.bodyTemplate: You deliver thoughts with gentleness and tact, prioritizing safety and ensuring nobody feels threatened or put on the spot.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might feel you sweep hard truths under the rug or hide your genuine opinions to maintain peace.

insights.title: You are a thoughtful observer.
insights.bodyTemplate: You listen closely and process interactions deeply before intervening. This gives your contributions high impact, as they are backed by reasoning.
insights.alternativeTemplate: People who thrive on quick interactions might misinterpret your quietness as critical evaluation.

insights.title: You command authority and lead decisions.
insights.bodyTemplate: You confidently take charge, state your choices, and steer groups forward out of a desire for clarity and execution.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can experience you as overbearing, stubborn, or dominating, feeling their input has been ignored.

insights.title: You are highly collaborative and receptive.
insights.bodyTemplate: You value other people's perspectives, yield to the group consensus, and create space for collective choices.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might view you as passive, indecisive, or hesitant to advocate for your own needs.

insights.title: You flow easily with changes.
insights.bodyTemplate: You adapt smoothly to shifting plans, welcoming new information and spontaneity without friction.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others may perceive you as disorganized or lacking commitment, feeling you change directions too frequently.

insights.title: You bring stable consistency.
insights.bodyTemplate: You honor plans, follow structured conventions, and provide a reliable anchor of routine for those around you.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might experience you as rigid, stubborn, or resistant to necessary adjustments when circumstances change.

insights.title: You operate with urgent momentum.
insights.bodyTemplate: You act quickly, decide fast, and keep conversations and projects moving at a high pace.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others may feel rushed or run over, experiencing your speed as impulsive or careless.

insights.title: You are deeply patient and deliberate.
insights.bodyTemplate: You prefer to slow down, analyze all details, and make sure things are done correctly and safely.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can find your pace slow or frustrating, misinterpreting caution as hesitation or stalling.

insights.title: You focus objectively on tasks and results.
insights.bodyTemplate: You prioritize logical progress, timelines, and raw results over social dynamics to get things done.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others may feel you are cold, transactional, or insensitive to the emotional climate of the group.

insights.title: You prioritize relationship harmony.
insights.bodyTemplate: You focus heavily on the morale, cohesion, and emotional alignment of the group above objective tasks.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might feel you prioritize feelings over productivity, delaying progress to manage minor emotional friction.

insights.title: You build trust through authenticity.
insights.bodyTemplate: You openly share your mistakes, emotions, and doubts, creating a human connection that invites others to open up.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might occasionally find this level of sharing uncomfortable, experiencing it as oversharing or emotional fragility.

insights.title: You maintain a composed, steady presence.
insights.bodyTemplate: You keep your feelings and doubts private, presenting a calm, objective, and dependable exterior under pressure.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can find you guarded, robotic, or hard to read, making it difficult for them to establish deep trust.

insights.title: You address conflict head-on.
insights.bodyTemplate: You step directly into tension, believing that honest debate and clearing the air is the healthiest path.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can find your approach intimidating, feeling that you are argumentative or picking unnecessary fights.

insights.title: You seek harmony and de-escalate tension.
insights.bodyTemplate: You use diplomacy, defusion, and patience to resolve friction, ensuring that discussions stay safe and calm.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might feel you avoid necessary conflict, sweeping critical arguments under the rug to maintain artificial peace.

insights.title: You drive growth through direct correction.
insights.bodyTemplate: You provide honest, constructive critiques pointing out flaws immediately to help others meet high standards.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can experience your feedback as harsh, discouraging, or feeling that their efforts are never good enough.

insights.title: You build confidence through encouragement.
insights.bodyTemplate: You focus on praising effort, protecting psychological safety, and giving gentle, supportive suggestions.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others might feel you withhold direct truths, offering soft encouragement when direct correction is needed.

insights.title: You bring lighthearted, playful energy.
insights.bodyTemplate: You use humor, playful teasing, and wit to defuse stress, keep conversations fun, and build friendly bonds.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others can misinterpret your teasing as passive-aggressive, or feel that you do not take serious situations seriously.

insights.title: You carry deep gravitas and respect.
insights.bodyTemplate: You treat interactions with seriousness and dignity, ensuring respect and professional weight in all matters.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Others may experience you as stiff, stuffy, or lacking warmth, feeling they cannot laugh or relax around you.

insights.title: You radiate personal warmth and expression.
insights.bodyTemplate: You show your emotions openly, sharing personal enthusiasm and empathy to make others feel validated.
insights.alternativeTemplate: Objective-minded individuals might misinterpret your high expressiveness as emotionally loaded or less logical.
